description: A vintage-style recruitment poster in muted blue, cream and red-orange tones. A stylized illustration of the Liberty Bell glows within a dark doorway or alcove at the center. Cream block text at the top reads GUARD THE PATH TOWARD LIBERTY, and a band across the bottom reads USCIS.GOV/JOIN.
notable_text: GUARD THE PATH TOWARD LIBERTY; USCIS.GOV/JOIN
